input.command:
# Get Solana chain info from Relay
curl -s "https://api.relay.link/chains" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
chains = d.get('chains', [])
sol = [c for c in chains if c.get('vmType') == 'svm' or 'solana' in c.get('name','').lower() or 'solana' in c.get('displayName','').lower()]
for c in sol:
    print(json.dumps({k: c.get(k) for k in ['id','name','displayName','vmType','disabled']}, indent=2))
"
input.description: Get Solana chain details from Relay API
